name: darw-rag
description: Evidence-first Markdown RAG workflow for research repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap and query evidence-first research RAGs.
interface.longDescription: Initialize a Markdown-first RAG, import BibTeX or Zotero ZIP exports, build chunk-level evidence, and expose compact read-only retrieval for research agents.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap RAG from this Zotero ZIP.
Import this BibTeX into DARW RAG.
Search RAG for evidence on this claim.
